proof_statement: A submitted app checkpoint has a deterministic root, valid item shape, non-duplicated nullifiers, and a retrievable receipt anchored to Stellar state.
private_witness: application-specific witness data remains outside RootVault

public_inputs.name: commitment_root
public_inputs.description: The deterministic root of the app checkpoint.

public_inputs.name: nullifier_hash
public_inputs.description: Hash of the nullifier set to prevent double-spending.

public_inputs.name: batch_root
public_inputs.description: The root of the batch receipt.

public_inputs.name: ledger_sequence
public_inputs.description: Sequence number of the ledger for the retention proof.

public_inputs.name: retention_proof
public_inputs.description: Proof of retention anchored to the state.
